items.user_turn: Please help me find vetted cultural homestay alternatives and short residency programs (2–6 weeks) that offer locked private rooms, reliable refrigeration for insulin, and clear vetting/safety procedures. My preferred travel window is Sept 1–30, 2026; my total budget is $2,500 and I prefer to pay any deposit by credit card. I have Type 1 diabetes and a mild nut allergy. I prefer urban cultural neighborhoods with easy public transit access. You can contact Ana Morales (residency coordinator) at ana.morales@residencyarts.org or +1-555-0199 to verify vetting procedures or references. Please filter options by my dates, budget, and health/accessibility needs and prepare contact templates to message hosts or coordinators.

items.user_turn: Please turn my Columbia River Gorge trail notes into a practical, shareable three-day plan. Preferred departure window is May 8–10, 2026 (flexible by two days). Emergency contact: myself, Emily Redfeather — emily.redfeather@goggle.com — 555-0199. Medical notes: mild exercise-induced asthma (I carry a Ventolin albuterol inhaler PRN) and a prior left-knee patellofemoral issue that flares on steep descents. Please include a day-by-day itinerary with mileages and estimated times, water and resupply points, alternate lower-angle routes and bailout options, a lightweight packing checklist, emergency procedures and local contacts, and a GPX export I can load to my phone/GPS that accounts for my medical needs.

items.user_turn: I want help turning my old, overly ambitious multi-country backpacking plan into two or three focused 7–10 day trips (or a single 8–14 day option) with day-by-day itineraries, realistic transit times and transport modes, a recommended daily pace, accommodation types favoring private rooms or guesthouses, estimated per-trip budgets, and a tailored packing and medication checklist. I can share the original long route if that helps. My departure window is mid‑June 2026 (roughly June 10–24), my target per-trip budget is $1,200, I have mild asthma and use an albuterol inhaler as needed, I can’t comfortably carry packs over about 12 kg for full days, and I prefer private rooms or guesthouses rather than dorms—please create manageable trip options and packing/medication lists that respect those limits.
